name: rootloom
description: A personal engineering quality layer for Codex: risk-aware, root-cause-driven, and verifiable.

interface.shortDescription: Reliable Codex engineering, woven from the roots up.
interface.longDescription: Rootloom gives individual developers low-friction Codex engineering with optional explainable risk analysis, owning-cause diagnosis, bounded review artifacts, behavior-specific verification, and relevant project lessons. Installation stays lightweight; deep review is explicit, single-agent, and separate from enterprise approval or audit machinery.
defaultPrompt: Classify and execute a task with the right Rootloom workflow tier.
Seed and refine AGENTS.md guidance for this repository.
Run an opt-in deep engineering review with a compact evidence summary.
